method: hash-intersect (K=10 over full stripped.gz) + K=20 coincidence filter over the K=10 hits
note: k20_survives: yes = candidate K=20 tuple == seq first-20 (survives); no = K=10 coincidence, diverges by term<=20 (seq has >=20 terms); na = seq has <20 terms, K=20 cannot disprove. Per-hit fresh hexa verify --expr deferred to O3 (CLI has no value-less compute mode — see INBOX g59 filing).
